groups.label: Worker.ts security hardening: CORS, auth middleware, rate limiting
groups.rationale: All three findings target the same file (worker.ts) and relate to request-level security controls

groups.label: Server route security: unauthenticated endpoints and SSRF validation
groups.rationale: Both files are in the server package with no overlap with other groups; identity-do auth and discovery SSRF fixes are independent but share the server domain

groups.label: AI adapter SSRF: incomplete IPv6 private URL validation
groups.rationale: Isolated to the ai package adapter; single-file fix for IPv6 SSRF bypass in isPrivateUrl()

conflictCheck: no file appears in multiple groups
